{{Quote|Maybe the thing just got tired and went away. Or maybe it decided a saber beam's not very palatable.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="SotME" />}}
An amorphous, translucent, and phosphorescent creature, the '''Lake-spirit''' inhabited the subterranean waterways of the planet [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]]. It sent out tentacle-like psuedopods to grasp prey. It had a rudimentary [[nervous system]] which would reabsorb the pseudopods in the presence of adverse stimuli (such as lightsabers).

While traveling into [[Coway]] territory beneath the surface of Mimban in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] were attacked by a Lake-spirit. It managed to pull Luke Skywalker under the water, but then retreated, possibly due to an aversion to Luke Skywalker's [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]].
